mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products
AND category_id = #{query.categoryId}
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND status = 'active'
SELECT * FROM products WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (name, description, price, category_id, seller_id, status, image_url, contact_phone, contact_wechat) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{categoryId}, #{sellerId}, #{status}, #{imageUrl}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactWechat})
